statement: In every magma, Equation 1147 (`x = y * ((z * (x * x)) * y)`) implies Equation 641 (`x = x * (y * ((y * x) * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0561
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op x x)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op y (op (op y x) z)))
